com_a11y_copy_failed: Copy failed. Your browser may have blocked clipboard access.
com_config_subtitle: View and manage instance configuration settings
com_config_select_section: Select a section to view configuration
com_config_local_changes: Example Banner: Admin Panel coming soon!
com_config_unsaved_leave: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?
com_config_server_name_exists: A server with this name already exists
com_config_mcp_invalid_after_edit: Cannot save: MCP server "{{entry}}" is missing required field "{{field}}" for its transport type.
com_config_reset_confirm: Reset "{{field}}" to its default value? This removes the DB override.
com_config_reset_base_confirm: By default, the base configuration starts from this instance's librechat.yaml file (or the built-in defaults if no file is configured) and is overridden by changes you make here in the admin panel. This resets the base configuration back to that starting point. This can't be undone.
com_config_reset_base_dirty: Save or discard your changes before resetting
com_config_simplify_disabled: Remove extra locale entries before switching to simple mode
com_config_import_yaml_desc: Upload or paste a librechat.yaml file to populate configuration values across the UI.
com_config_import_as_base_desc: Update the default settings in librechat.yaml
com_config_import_as_profile_desc: Apply imported values as profile settings for a specific scope
com_config_interface_permissions_info: Feature access permissions (prompts, agents, marketplace, etc.) are managed per-role in Access > Roles.
com_config_section_fileStrategies_desc: Configure file handling strategies per endpoint
com_config_section_cloudfront_desc: Serve files through an Amazon CloudFront distribution
com_config_section_messageFilter_desc: Filter or block patterns in user messages
com_config_section_secureImageLinks_desc: Enable secure, authenticated image URL delivery
com_config_section_skillSync_desc: Periodically pull skill definitions from external sources
com_endpoint_anthropic_prompt_cache: Cache stable prompt context (system messages, tools, long inputs) at the API to reduce per-request input tokens on Anthropic models
com_auth_2fa_prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
com_auth_2fa_invalid_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
com_auth_2fa_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
com_auth_unable_connect: Unable to connect. Please try again.
com_auth_sso_no_code: No authorization code received. Please try again.
com_auth_sso_exchange_failed: Authentication failed. The code may have expired.
com_auth_sso_redirect_failed: SSO redirect failed. You can sign in manually below.
com_error_page_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or return to the home page.
com_error_not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
com_scope_add_for_scope: Add profile value for this scope
com_scope_no_changed_in_tab: No changed fields in this tab
com_scope_delete_confirm: Delete configuration for "{{name}}"? This removes all profile overrides.
com_users_subtitle: Manage users, roles, and permissions for LibreChat
com_users_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
com_users_delete_profile_desc: Delete the configuration profile for {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
com_groups_subtitle: Manage user groups for configuration profiles and access control
com_access_subtitle: Manage groups, roles, and member permissions
com_access_permissions_load_error: Unable to load permissions for this role.
com_access_delete_group_desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All members will be removed and profile configuration will be lost.
com_access_delete_role_desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All members will be removed and profile configuration will be lost.
com_access_save_order_desc: This will update the priority order for all items. Are you sure?
com_access_reorder_hint: Drag items to reorder priority. Higher items take precedence.
com_access_remove_member_desc: Are you sure you want to remove {{user}} from {{name}}?
com_perm_desc_PROMPTS: Create, share, and use prompt templates
com_perm_desc_AGENTS: Create, share, and use custom agents
com_perm_desc_MCP_SERVERS: Connect and manage MCP tool servers
com_perm_desc_REMOTE_AGENTS: Connect and manage remote agent endpoints
com_perm_desc_SKILLS: Create, share, and use agent skills
com_perm_desc_SHARED_LINKS: Create and share conversation share links
com_perm_desc_PEOPLE_PICKER: Control visibility of users, groups, and roles
com_help_docs_desc: Comprehensive guides for configuring and running LibreChat
com_help_api_desc: Detailed reference for librechat.yaml and environment setup
com_help_community_desc: Join the community on GitHub for discussions and contributions
com_help_discord_desc: Chat with the community and get support on Discord
com_help_support_text: Need help? Contact your system administrator or visit the LibreChat documentation for troubleshooting guides.
com_cap_subtitle: Manage which principals hold system-level capabilities
com_cap_desc_read_audit_log: View and export the audit log of grant changes
com_access_denied_description: You don't have permission to view this page. Contact your administrator.
com_cap_no_permission: You need {{cap}} to perform this action
com_audit_subtitle: Track all changes to system capabilities
com_audit_detail_not_found: Audit log entry not found. It may have been purged or the link is incorrect.
com_audit_detail_load_error: Couldn't load this audit log entry. The request failed — try again in a moment.
com_a11y_audit_filter_changed: {{count}} audit log entries match the current filters
com_dash_subtitle: Here's everything you need to manage your LibreChat instance.
com_dash_config_desc: View and manage instance configuration settings.
com_dash_access_desc: Create and manage groups, assign roles, and fine-tune member permissions across your organization.
com_dash_grants_desc: Control which capabilities each role has access to, from reading configs to managing users.
com_dash_help_desc: Links to documentation, community resources, and support channels to help you get the most out of LibreChat.
com_dash_tip_sidebar: The sidebar gives you access to every page: Configuration, Access, Grants, and Help. Toggle it open to see labels or collapse it down to just icons.
com_dash_tip_cmdk: The command menu lets you search for and jump to any page, configuration section, or config tab. You can also switch between light, dark, and system themes within the menu.
com_grants_assign_hint: Roles and groups can be edited directly from the table above.
com_error_load_groups: Failed to load groups. Please try again.
com_error_load_members: Failed to load members. Please try again.
com_perm_unavailable_desc: The permissions service is temporarily unavailable. Please reload the page to try again.
